title: telemetry-logs — subprocessors
description: Where log records ship to third-party sinks, that vendor is a subprocessor. Self-hosted Loki / OTel Collector on our own K8s is NOT a subprocessor.

subprocessors.name: Grafana Cloud Loki
data_processed: record labels (workspace_id, workspace_id, level, channel, service.name)
subprocessors.when_engaged: telemetry-logs.sinks.loki.enabled=true AND endpoint points at grafana.net

notes: Grafana Alloy / Grafana Agent / DataDog Agent running as sidecars on our own K8s are NOT subprocessors — they're transport, not processing.
The choice of sink is deployment-specific. Modules never bind to a sink directly — always through the ChannelResolver.
